hero.heading:
Bright, Brilliant,
Boundless.
hero.sub: More than just a fund administrator, NuBright serves as an extension of your team. We help clients achieve steady AUM growth and optimized investor relations, turning administrative service into a virtuous cycle with investment value.

timeline.heading: With you, at every stage.
timeline.sub: From inception to exit, we are with you every step of the way.

s1.title: Fund Formation
s1.sub: With you, when you lay the foundation.
s1.quote: The foundation laid in the first year determines the height that can be built in the tenth.
s1.i3exp: We help you identify, evaluate, and onboard the right combination of fund administrators, auditors, legal counsel, and technology providers — creating an ecosystem calibrated to your fund's strategy, size, and investor base.

s2.title: Fundraising
s2.sub: With you, when you earn their trust.
s2.quote: Raising capital is a process, not a single event. We make sure your back office never becomes the bottleneck.

s3.title:
Investment & Post-Investment
Management Period
s3.sub: With you, when you focus on the vision.
s3.quote: Good governance and clear reporting builds investor trust that can withstand a bad quarter.
s3.i1exp: We review and process all fund-level payments — capital calls, distributions, management fees, and expense reimbursements — with full audit trails and dual-control procedures to ensure accuracy and compliance at every step.
s3.i4: Implementation of side letter special provisions

s4.title: Reporting & Exit Period
s4.sub: With you, when you deliver the legacy.
s4.quote: A clean exit is your final promise to your investors. We help you keep it.
s4.i3exp: We prepare and review fund financial statements in accordance with applicable accounting standards, coordinate with external auditors, and manage the full audit process — from fieldwork support to final sign-off — so your investors receive accurate, timely reports.

whyNuBright.heading: Built different, on purpose.
whyNuBright.sub: Proven expertise and institutional rigour, powered by technology built for the way funds actually operate.

t1.label: A Team That Understands Entrepreneurs
t1.title: A Team That Understands Entrepreneurs
t1.body: We know every detail of funds, and we have an even deeper understanding of every challenge entrepreneurs face. Our team has been deeply involved in the complete journey of more than 1,000 funds — from 0 to 1 and from 1 to 100.

dark.label: Years of experience
dark.sub: Our core team has over 20 years of deep industry experience, navigating full market cycles and witnessing the rise of domestic USD funds.

light.label: Funds navigated from 0 to 1
light.sub: We have been deeply involved in the complete journey of more than 1,000 funds — from 0 to 1 and from 1 to 100.

t2.label: Rigorous Operational Standards
t2.title: Rigorous Operational Standards
t2.body: 20 years of process expertise encoded into repeatable, auditable workflows that every team member executes identically. Consistent quality, not dependent on individuals.

t3.label: Digital-Intelligent System Support
t3.title: Digital-Intelligent System Support
t3.body: Two platforms built from the ground up for the reality of fund administration. Full visibility, no black boxes. Investors and fund managers can access real-time data, documents, and status updates — anytime, without asking us.
t3.desc: Built on the synergy of two platforms – "Manager Portal" and "Investor Portal". Data-centric, breaking down silos across clients, products, processes, and risks.

cta.sub: Let's talk about your fund. No pitch decks — just a real conversation about what you're building.
cta.btn: Contact Us to Partner with NuBright

investorPortal.title: 7×24 All-Day Service Portal
investorPortal.sub: Investors get round-the-clock access to their portfolio data, documents, and capital activity — no waiting, no chasing, no black boxes.
investorPortal.cardDesc: Dedicated one-stop subscription/redemption application and information inquiry — Access portfolio holdings, fund NAVs, transaction records, periodic reports, and income details anytime, anywhere. Delivers a fully transparent, always-on investment service experience.

f1.title: Easy Onboarding
f1.body: Complete your profile and submit required documents digitally via the "My Profile" section—quick, secure, and entirely paperless.

f2.title: Streamlined Transactions
f2.body: Initiate subscription and redemption requests online at your convenience, with a simple and guided process.

f3.title: Full Transparency
f3.body: Track the status of your subscription or redemption in real time—from submission through to registration—and monitor the fund's performance and key documents anytime.

managerPortal.title: One-Stop Digital Operations Workbench
managerPortal.sub: A unified command centre for fund managers to oversee operations, track performance, and manage investors — all from a single, real-time platform.

f1.title: Panoramic Data View & Real-Time Query
f1.body: Deeply integrates multi-dimensional operational data including funds, valuations, and investors. Centralized, real-time query for comprehensive visibility into fund operations.

f2.title: Business Process Digitalization
f2.body: Supports online submission, review, and confirmation of core operations such as valuation confirmation and TA processing. Achieves end-to-end digital workflows with full traceability, significantly improving efficiency and enhancing internal control transparency.

f3.title: Digital Document Management
f3.body: Electronically archives fund legal, operational, financial, and investor documents for one-click access. Ensures unified, secure, and traceable filing, supporting rapid response to audits and regulatory requests.

technologyHero.sub: We didn't build these systems to look impressive. We built them because we refused to let service quality depend on individual performance. Every workflow is standardized, every action is traceable.

aboutHero.heading: Choice reveals Taste.
aboutHero.sub: Every decision we've made — about how we hire, how we work, how we build our systems — is a reflection of what we believe great service actually means.

ourSpirits.title: Our Spirits
ourSpirits.sub: Three beliefs — our starting point, our way of working, and what we're building toward.

s1.heading: Boutique Soul, Institutional Strength.
s1.body: With the heart of a craftsman, we build institutional-grade instruments. We approach every system as a work of art — built to stand the test of time. Small enough to care, rigorous enough to be trusted.

s2.heading: Master the Fine Details. See the Big Picture.
s2.body: Precision in the small, direction in the large. Every number can stand scrutiny, every decision sees the road ahead. We never treat accuracy and perspective as a trade-off.

s3.heading: Visionary in Thinking, Grounded in Action.
s3.body: Forward-looking vision paired with down-to-earth execution. We turn two decades of experience into reusable, systemic wisdom — so the next generation of funds can stand on firmer ground.

ourDailyLife.title: Our Daily Life
ourDailyLife.sub: We asked our team to draw what a real day at NuBright looks like. No stock photos — just honest moments from people who take their work seriously.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us about your fund and what you're looking for...
